sections.paragraph:
Judah H3061
H3063
1. Son of Jacob:
- General references
Gen 35:23
- Intercedes for Joseph's life when his brethren were about to slay him, and proposes that they sell him to the Ishmaelites
Gen 37:27
- Takes two wives
Gen 38:6
- Dwells at Chezib
Gen 38:5
- His incest with his daughter-in-law
Gen 38:26
- Goes down into Egypt for corn
Gen 43:10; Gen 44:34; Gen 46:28
- Prophetic benediction of his father upon
Gen 49:12
- The ancestor of Jesus
Mat 1:3; Rev 5:5
2. Tribe of:
- Prophecies concerning
Gen 49:10
- Enrollment of the military forces of:
b at Sinai
Num 1:27; Num 2:4
b at Bezek
1Sa 11:8; 2Sa 24:9
b in the plain of Moab
Num 26:22
- Place of, in camp and march
Num 2:3; Num 2:9; Num 10:14
- By whom commanded
Num 2:3
- Moses' benediction upon
Deu 33:7
- Commissioned of God to lead in the conquest of the promised land

- Make David king
2Sa 2:11; 2Sa 5:5
- Upbraided by David for lukewarmness toward him after Absalom's defeat
2Sa 19:15
- Accused by the other tribes of stealing the heart of David
2Sa 19:43
- Loyal to David at the time of the insurrection led by Sheba
2Sa 20:2
- Is accorded the birthright forfeited by Reuben
1Ch 5:2; 1Ch 28:4; Psa 60:7
- Loyal to the house of David at the time of the revolt of the ten tribes
1Ki 12:20
- Inheritance of
Jos 15; Jos 18:5; Jos 19:1; Jos 19:9
3. Name of two exiled priests
Ezr 10:23; Neh 12:8
4. A Benjamite
Neh 11:9
5. A prince or priest who assisted in the dedication of the walls of Jerusalem
Neh 12:34; Neh 12:36
